race.description: Tle Thanks Sal Lighting Provincial Handicap (C1)
race.comment: ME ME (7) raced in stronger company and had no luck from a wide gate over this trip at Hawkesbury last time. Improved beaten 2L over 1200m at this track prior and maps much better today. Has a 1.5kg claim and the local deserves another chance. NYMPHADORA (9) showed good early speed in the same Hawkesbury contest before fading out. She wasn't beaten too far at Canterbury first-up prior and goes okay third-up. Draws inside and has more to give. Should be right in it. GREYT THINKER (3) returned from a spell and raced forward here a month ago beaten 3 lengths over 1200m at this track. Has trialled since and won his only second-up outing. He also has more up his sleeve and deserves consideration. KITTY OKAY (6) improved again just missing over 1300m in a 64 at Warwick Farm. Has to push forward from an outside barrier but can feature with average luck. ICEFORD (1) is a former Irish galloper resuming for the Beer yard. Has the ability and was placed in a recent trial here. Keep onside.
